title: rubus × eurythyrsoides
intro: Rubus × eurythyrsoides, also known as the raspberry-leaved blackberry or hybrid blackberry, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus ursinus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × eurythyrsoides include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × eurythyrsoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Rubus × eurythyrsoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
